name: moyan-pmi
_doc: PMI / moyan trust-assessment governance endpoint (Liuyanfeng1234, autogen#7353). Every response carries a signed governance block. Scheme ed25519-jcs: envelope_hash = SHA-256(JCS(response excluding the governance block)); the Ed25519 signature is over the envelope_hash HEX STRING (the adapter auto-detects raw-bytes vs hex-string). verifier_pubkey is the governance signing key, independent of the agent's own key.
